steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: That is $\tfrac{4680}{36}\%=130\%$ of $k$. The answer is 130.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $130$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $130$.
